package.name: formation_cosim_ros2
package.description: Full ROS2 Co-Simulation Platform 1: Python hybrid MPC formation controller (ZMQ) connected to N simulated unicycle robots via ROS2 topics. Replaces plant_node.py with two ROS2 nodes: unicycle_fleet_node — N differential-drive robots simulated at 20 Hz formation_planner_node — ZMQ bridge + MPC orchestration + CSV logging coordinator_node.py and controller_node.py × N are unchanged.
